subcodes.first_line: The world is engulfed with the fires of tyranny and injustice. The heedless have chosen the vanities of the world over everlasting bliss
subcodes.first_line_orig: عالم را شراره ظلم و اعتساف اخذ نموده نفوس غافله زخارف فانیه را بر نعمت باقیه
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @thankfulness; gratitude, @love of God, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
